n: The Good Will of the Galadhrim

steps.t: Hrólfur, an important overseer, can likely be found in the Chamber of the Cross-roads in Moria, in Durin's Way. Haldir has pressed you to bring an imp…
Haldir awaits news of your good deeds towards the dwarves upon his flet near the River Nimrodel, on the western border of Lothlórien. You should seek …
